text: Muhammad Hidayat Mauluddin is a Full-Stack Web Developer based in Palembang, Indonesia, with expertise in Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, and MySQL. He has experience building scalable web applications and REST APIs.
He completed a Master of Computer Science at Sriwijaya University with a GPA of 3.92 and a Bachelor's in Information Systems with a GPA of 3.66.

He has experience building web applications such as a Progressive Web App (PWA) attendance system with location validation and role-based access control, as well as a Point of Sale (POS) system with authentication, product management, transaction handling, and reporting features.

His machine learning experience includes face image restoration using CNN and U-Net, evaluated with PSNR and SSIM, as well as heart attack prediction using Artificial Neural Network (ANN) optimized with Genetic Algorithm (GA) and Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO).
